title: Sparc Hydrogen Achieves Key Hydrogen Milestone as Roseworthy Pilot Plant Enters Operational Testing
content:
Sparc Technologies (ASX: SPN) has achieved a significant milestone by demonstrating sustained hydrogen generation at its green hydrogen pilot plant in Roseworthy, South Australia. This achievement marks the completion of the commissioning phase and the official transition to full operational testing under concentrated solar conditions.

Managing Director Nick Oâ€™Loughlin stated that this success positions Sparc Hydrogen at the global forefront of emerging direct solar-to-hydrogen technology. The pilot plant is a first-of-its-kind facility testing a method that could offer a pathway to low-cost green hydrogen production, distinct from traditional electrolysis methods. The company views this technology as a crucial entry point into a global market that is forecast to reach an annual value of US$1.4 trillion by 2050. The successful testing phase validates the system's ability to operate effectively using concentrated solar energy to drive the hydrogen generation process.
author: Analysts Account
